description: Per-learner capability gap analysis and role readiness data. One row per learner + capability + learning path + role. This is the single source of truth for the gap engine — required level, gap, recommendation context, and badge attainment all live here.

fields.name: learner_id
fields.description: Learner this capability record belongs to

fields.name: capability_id
fields.description: Capability associated with this record. Core unit used for gap analysis and progression.

fields.name: learning_path_id
fields.description: The learning path this capability record is scoped to.

fields.name: role_id
fields.description: The role this capability is being assessed against.

fields.name: current_level
fields.description: Learner's current capability level on the L0–L4 scale. Defaults to L0 (no exposure) at record creation. L0=no exposure, L1=awareness, L2=working knowledge, L3=applied skill, L4=mastery.

fields.name: required_level
fields.description: Minimum capability level required by the role. Sourced from role_capability_map.required_level at the time the learning path was generated.

fields.name: gap
fields.description: Computed gap = required_level - current_level. Positive means learner needs improvement. Zero or negative means no gap.

fields.name: has_gap
fields.description: True if gap > 0. Used by the recommendation engine to identify capabilities needing course assignments.

fields.name: gap_score
fields.description: Gap expressed as a 0–100 score for path prioritization and ranking.

fields.name: badge
fields.description: Badge earned by the learner for this capability. Null until a badge threshold is reached. learner = foundational completion, skilled = intermediate proficiency, advance = high-level mastery.

fields.name: why_needed
fields.description: Why this capability is needed for the learner's target role.
fields.example: Monitor production systems and diagnose runtime issues

fields.name: how_to_build
fields.description: How the learner should build this capability.
fields.example: Complete observability training with logging and monitoring tools

constraints.name: chk_current_level_range
constraints.description: current_level must be on the L0–L4 scale

constraints.name: chk_required_level_range
constraints.description: required_level must be on the L0–L4 scale

constraints.name: chk_gap_computed
constraints.description: gap must always equal required_level - current_level

constraints.name: chk_has_gap_consistent
constraints.rule: (gap > 0 AND has_gap = true) OR (gap <= 0 AND has_gap = false)
constraints.description: has_gap must be true when gap > 0 and false otherwise

constraints.name: chk_badge_values
constraints.rule: badge IN ('learner', 'skilled', 'advance') OR badge IS NULL
constraints.description: badge must be one of the defined enum values or null

indexes.name: idx_learner_capabilities_unique
indexes.description: One capability record per learner per capability per path per role — prevents duplicates

indexes.name: idx_learner_capabilities_learner_path_role
indexes.description: Fetch all capabilities for a learner scoped to a specific path and role

indexes.name: idx_learner_capabilities_has_gap
indexes.description: Fetch all capabilities where learner has a gap — primary input to course recommendation engine

indexes.name: idx_learner_capabilities_badge
indexes.description: Fetch all badge-earned capabilities for a learner for dashboard and profile display

indexes.name: idx_learner_capabilities_role_capability
indexes.description: Look up required level for a capability within a role

indexes.name: idx_learner_capabilities_learner_capability
indexes.description: Fetch all path/role records for a learner scoped to a specific capability

relationships.description: Each capability record belongs to one learner
Each record references a capability definition
Each capability record is scoped to one learning path
Each capability record is assessed against one role
required_level is sourced from role_capability_map at path generation time

sample_records.why_needed: Monitor production systems and diagnose runtime issues
sample_records.how_to_build: Learn logging, debugging, and monitoring tools
